zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothe Odell於大約1526年出生在英國貝德福爾馬爾斯頓 莫利恩時，她的父親Robert Odell23歲，母親Alice Dutton27歲。她去世於1558年1月30日在英國巴金哈姆爾其勒享年33歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾其勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dorothe Odell于大约1526年出生在英国貝德福爾馬爾斯頓 莫利恩时，她的父亲Robert Odell23岁，母亲Alice Dutton27岁。她去世于1558年1月30日在英国巴金哈姆爾其勒享年33岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾其勒。

nameMeanings.name: Odell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Odell, a place in Bedfordshire, which derives from Old English wād ‘woad’ (a plant collected for the blue dye that could be obtained from it) + hyll ‘hill’. The spelling O'Dell is not Irish, but a creation by folk etymology, found first among English migrants to Limerick. Compare Waddell . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau does not distinguish between the surnames O'Dell and Odell .
Altered form of Swedish   Odell  , as if of Irish origin.

variants.name: O'Dell
meanings: English: habitational name from Odell, a place in Bedfordshire, which derives from Old English wād ‘woad’ (a plant collected for the blue dye that could be obtained from it) + hyll ‘hill’. The spelling O'Dell is not Irish, but a creation by folk etymology, found first among English migrants to Limerick. Compare Waddell . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau does not distinguish between the surnames O'Dell and Odell .
Altered form of Swedish   Odell  , as if of Irish origin.

variants.name: Waddell
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Wedale near Galashiels (Selkirkshire). This was also the old name of the parish of Stow in Midlothian. The placename may be from Old English wēoh ‘heathen shrine’ (and if so, an example which is unusually far north, and therefore Old English wēod ‘weed, herb’ might be preferred) + dæl ‘hollow, dell’.

English: habitational name from Wadden Hall in Waltham (Kent). The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Wæda (genitive Wæden) or Old English wāden ‘growing with woad’ + Old English halh ‘nook, corner of land’.

English: perhaps a habitational name from Woodhill Park in Clyffe Pypard (Wiltshire). The placename derives from Old English wād ‘woad’ + hyll ‘hill’. Alternatively, this name might derive from a hypothetical Middle English personal name Wadel (Old English Wædel).

nameMeanings.name: Dorothe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of a post-classical Greek name, from dōron ‘gift’ + theos ‘god’ (the same elements as in Theodora , but in reverse order). The masculine form Dorotheus was borne by several early Christian saints, the feminine by only two minor ones, but only the girl's name has survived. In modern use in the English-speaking world it represents either a 19th-century Latinization of Dorothy or a learned reborrowing.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothe Odell was born about 1526, in Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Robert Odell, was 23 and her mother, Alice Dutton, was 27. She died on 30 January 1558, in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothe Odell est née environ 1526, à Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Odell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Alice Dutton, avait 27 ans. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1558, à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothe Odell um 1526 in Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Odell 23 und ihre Mutter Alice Dutton 27. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1558 im Alter von 33 Jahren in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothe Odell è nata il circa 1526 nel Marston Moreteyne, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Robert Odell, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Alice Dutton, aveva 27 anni. Morì il 30 gennaio 1558, nel Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 33 anni, e fu sepolta a Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothe Odellが約1526年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアマーストン モーエテインで生まれた時，父Robert Odellは23歳，母Alice Duttonは27歳であった。彼女は1558年1月30日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーで33歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアチチェリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dorothe Odell(이)가 대략 1526년 영국 베드퍼드실르 마스턴 모레테이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Odell(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Dutton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1558년 1월 30일 영국 벅잉함실르 치셸이에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 치셸이에 묻혔다.

Ela faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1558, em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Chicheley, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothe Odell родилась около 1526 г. в местности марстон моретин, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Odell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Dutton, 27. Она умерла 30 января 1558 г. в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности шичели, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
